mapper.insert: INSERT INTO repo_steering (repo_id, steering_id, mandatory, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{repoId}, #{steeringId}, #{mandatory}, NOW(), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (repo_id, steering_id) DO UPDATE SET mandatory = #{mandatory}, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM repo_steering WHERE repo_id = #{repoId} AND steering_id = #{steeringId}
mapper.select: SELECT rs.id AS binding_id, rs.steering_id, s.title AS steering_title, s.status AS steering_status, rs.mandatory, rs.created_at FROM repo_steering rs JOIN steering s ON s.id = rs.steering_id WHERE rs.repo_id = #{repoId} ORDER BY rs.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repo_steering WHERE repo_id = #{repoId}

SELECT rs.id AS binding_id, rs.repo_id, r.name AS repo_name, r.full_name AS repo_full_name, r.enabled AS repo_enabled, rs.mandatory, rs.created_at FROM repo_steering rs JOIN repo r ON r.id = rs.repo_id WHERE rs.steering_id = #{steeringId} ORDER BY rs.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repo_steering WHERE steering_id = #{steeringId}
SELECT id, repo_id, steering_id, mandatory, created_at, updated_at FROM repo_steering WHERE repo_id = #{repoId} AND steering_id = #{steeringId} LIMIT 1
